mapper.select: SELECT A.ADOPTION_ID AS adoptionId, A.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, A.ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, A.VISIT_DATE AS visitDate, A.APPLY_DATE AS applyDate, A.STATUS AS status, A.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, AN.ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, AN.ANIMAL_TYPE AS animalType, AN.BREED AS breed, AN.AGE AS age, AN.PERSONALITY AS personality, AI.SAVE_FILE_NAME AS mainImage, M.PROFILE_IMG AS profileImg, D.JOB AS job, D.HOUSING_TYPE AS housingType, D.PET_EXPERIENCE AS petExperience, D.ADDRESS AS address, D.ADOPTION_REASON AS adoptionReason FROM ADOPTION A LEFT JOIN ANIMAL AN ON A.ANIMAL_ID = AN.ANIMAL_ID LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE AI ON AN.ANIMAL_ID = AI.ANIMAL_ID AND AI.IS_MAIN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON A.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ADOPTION_DETAIL D ON A.ADOPTION_ID = D.ADOPTION_ID ORDER BY A.APPLY_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ADOPTION
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ADOPTION WHERE STATUS = #{status}
select count(*) from member where trunc(JOIN_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT RECRUIT_ID AS recruitId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, VOLUNTEER_DATE AS volunteerDate, LOCATION AS location, APPLY_DEADLINE AS applyDeadline, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, STATUS AS status, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, THUMBNAIL_IMG AS thumbnailImg FROM VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT WHERE RECRUIT_ID = #{recruitId}

SELECT RECRUIT_ID AS recruitId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, VOLUNTEER_DATE AS volunteerDate, LOCATION AS location, APPLY_DEADLINE AS applyDeadline, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, STATUS AS status, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, THUMBNAIL_IMG AS thumbnailImg FROM VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC, RECRUIT_ID DESC

SELECT VA.VOLUNTEER_ID AS volunteerId, VA.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, VA.RECRUIT_ID AS recruitId, VA.INTEREST_TYPE AS interestType, VA.STATUS AS status, VA.APPLY_REASON AS applyReason, VA.APPLY_DATE AS applyDate, VA.VOLUNTEER_DATE AS volunteerDate, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, M.PHONE AS phone FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY VA JOIN MEMBER M ON VA.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE VA.RECRUIT_ID = #{recruitId} ORDER BY VA.APPLY_DATE DESC, VA.VOLUNTEER_ID DESC

SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, MEMBER_PW AS memberPw, NICKNAME AS nickname, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, JOIN_DATE AS joinDate, STATUS AS status, ROLE AS role, PROFILE_IMG AS profileImg, MEMBER_NAME AS memberName FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ANIMAL A WHERE 1=1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ANIMAL_ID as animalId, ANIMAL_NAME as animalName, ANIMAL_TYPE as animalType, BREED as breed, ADOPTION_STATUS as adoptionStatus, CREATE_DATE as createDate FROM ANIMAL ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC, ANIMAL_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM (
SELECT 'ADOPTION' AS TYPE, ADOPTION_ID AS ID, MEMBER_ID || '님 입양 상담 방문' AS TITLE, '방문 예정' AS CONTENT, TO_CHAR(VISIT_DATE, 'HH24:MI') AS TIME, TO_CHAR(VISIT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS FULL_TIME, VISIT_DATE AS SORT_DATE FROM ADOPTION WHERE TO_CHAR(VISIT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND STATUS = '승인'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'VOLUNTEER' AS TYPE, VOLUNTEER_ID AS ID, MEMBER_ID || '님 봉사 활동' AS TITLE, '센터 방문 봉사' AS CONTENT, TO_CHAR(VOLUNTEER_DATE, 'HH24:MI') AS TIME, TO_CHAR(VOLUNTEER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS FULL_TIME, VOLUNTEER_DATE AS SORT_DATE FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY WHERE TO_CHAR(VOLUNTEER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND STATUS = '승인' ) ORDER BY SORT_DATE ASC
SELECT ADOPTION_ID as ID, MEMBER_ID as TITLE, '신청 동물 번호: ' || ANIMAL_ID as CONTENT, TO_CHAR(APPLY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as TIME FROM ADOPTION WHERE ADOPTION_ID = #{id}
SELECT V_APPLY_ID as ID, MEMBER_ID as TITLE, '봉사 신청 내역 확인' as CONTENT, TO_CHAR(APPLY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as TIME FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY WHERE VOLUNTEER_ID = #{id}

SELECT TYPE, ID, TITLE, CONTENT, TIME, FULL_TIME, DATE_KEY FROM ( /* ── 입양 상담: 승인 + 심사중 ── */ SELECT 'ADOPTION' AS TYPE, TO_CHAR(A.ADOPTION_ID) AS ID, A.MEMBER_ID || '님 입양 상담' AS TITLE, NVL(AN.ANIMAL_NAME,'동물') || ' (' || NVL(AN.ANIMAL_TYPE,'-') || ')' AS CONTENT, TO_CHAR(A.VISIT_DATE, 'HH24:MI') AS TIME, TO_CHAR(A.VISIT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS FULL_TIME, TO_CHAR(A.VISIT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DATE_KEY FROM ADOPTION A LEFT JOIN ANIMAL AN ON A.ANIMAL_ID = AN.ANIMAL_ID WHERE A.VISIT_DATE IS NOT NULL AND A.STATUS IN ('승인', '심사중') AND TO_CHAR(A.VISIT_DATE, 'YYYYMM') =
#{year} || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')
UNION ALL
/* ── 봉사 활동: 승인 + 대기 ── */ SELECT 'VOLUNTEER' AS TYPE, TO_CHAR(VA.VOLUNTEER_ID) AS ID, VA.MEMBER_ID || '님 봉사' AS TITLE, NVL(VR.TITLE,'봉사') || ' @ ' || NVL(VR.LOCATION,'-') AS CONTENT, TO_CHAR(VA.VOLUNTEER_DATE, 'HH24:MI') AS TIME, TO_CHAR(VA.VOLUNTEER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS FULL_TIME, TO_CHAR(VA.VOLUNTEER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DATE_KEY FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY VA LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT VR ON VA.RECRUIT_ID = VR.RECRUIT_ID WHERE VA.VOLUNTEER_DATE IS NOT NULL AND VA.STATUS IN ('승인', '대기') AND TO_CHAR(VA.VOLUNTEER_DATE, 'YYYYMM') =
#{year} || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')
UNION ALL
/* ── 봉사 모집글 (관리자 등록): VOLUNTEER_DATE 기준 ── */ SELECT 'RECRUIT' AS TYPE, TO_CHAR(VR.RECRUIT_ID) AS ID, '[모집] ' || VR.TITLE AS TITLE, VR.LOCATION AS CONTENT, '종일' AS TIME, TO_CHAR(VR.VOLUNTEER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' 종일' AS FULL_TIME, TO_CHAR(VR.VOLUNTEER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DATE_KEY FROM VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT VR WHERE VR.VOLUNTEER_DATE IS NOT NULL AND VR.STATUS = '모집중' AND TO_CHAR(VR.VOLUNTEER_DATE, 'YYYYMM') =
#{year} || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')
) ORDER BY DATE_KEY ASC, TIME ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, A.ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, A.ANIMAL_TYPE AS animalType, A.VIEW_COUNT AS hit, AI.SAVE_FILE_NAME AS mainImage FROM ANIMAL A LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE AI ON A.ANIMAL_ID = AI.ANIMAL_ID AND AI.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE A.ADOPTION_STATUS = '입양가능' ORDER BY A.VIEW_COUNT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD WHERE IS_HIDDEN = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, T.* FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TITLE AS title, B.IS_HIDDEN AS isHidden, TO_CHAR(B.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createDate, COUNT(R.REPORT_ID) AS reportCount FROM BOARD B INNER JOIN BOARD_REPORT R ON B.BOARD_ID = R.BOARD_ID WHERE R.STATUS = 'N' GROUP BY B.BOARD_ID, B.MEMBER_ID, B.BOARD_TYPE, B.TITLE, B.IS_HIDDEN, B.CREATE_DATE ORDER BY reportCount DESC, B.BOARD_ID DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{startRow}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT BOARD_ID) FROM BOARD_REPORT WHERE STATUS = 'N'

SELECT REPORT_ID AS reportId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, REASON AS reason, TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS reportDate, STATUS AS status FROM BOARD_REPORT WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ANIMAL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY WHERE STATUS = '승인'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, A.ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, A.ANIMAL_TYPE AS animalType, A.BREED AS breed, A.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, AI.SAVE_FILE_NAME AS mainImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FAVORITE_ANIMAL F WHERE F.ANIMAL_ID = A.ANIMAL_ID) AS favoriteCount FROM ANIMAL A LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE AI ON A.ANIMAL_ID = AI.ANIMAL_ID AND AI.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE A.ADOPTION_STATUS = '입양가능' ORDER BY (A.VIEW_COUNT + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FAVORITE_ANIMAL F WHERE F.ANIMAL_ID = A.ANIMAL_ID)) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RECRUIT_ID AS recruitId, TITLE AS title, LOCATION AS location, THUMBNAIL_IMG AS thumbnailImg, VOLUNTEER_DATE AS volunteerDate FROM VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT WHERE STATUS = '모집중' ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, TITLE AS title, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount FROM BOARD WHERE IS_HIDDEN = 'N' AND CREATE_DATE >= SYSDATE - 7 ORDER BY (VIEW_COUNT + LIKE_COUNT * 2) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DONATOR_NAME AS donatorName, SUM(DONATION_AMOUNT) AS totalAmount FROM DONATION WHERE DONATION_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') GROUP BY DONATOR_NAME ORDER BY totalAmount DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ADOPTION A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.STATUS = #{_parameter}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, T.* FROM ( SELECT A.ADOPTION_ID, A.MEMBER_ID, A.ANIMAL_ID, A.VISIT_DATE, A.APPLY_DATE, A.STATUS, A.REJECT_REASON,
M.MEMBER_NAME, M.NICKNAME, M.EMAIL, M.PHONE, M.PROFILE_IMG,
AN.ANIMAL_NAME, AN.ANIMAL_TYPE, AN.BREED, AN.AGE, AN.GENDER, AN.ADOPTION_STATUS, AN.PERSONALITY,
AI.SAVE_FILE_NAME AS MAIN_IMAGE,
D.JOB, D.HOUSING_TYPE, D.PET_EXPERIENCE, D.ADDRESS, D.ADOPTION_REASON FROM ADOPTION A JOIN MEMBER M ON A.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID JOIN ANIMAL AN ON A.ANIMAL_ID = AN.ANIMAL_ID LEFT JOIN ADOPTION_DETAIL D ON A.ADOPTION_ID = D.ADOPTION_ID LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE AI ON AN.ANIMAL_ID = AI.ANIMAL_ID AND AI.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.STATUS = #{statusFilter}
ORDER BY A.APPLY_DATE DESC, A.ADOPTION_ID DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{startRow}

SELECT A.ADOPTION_ID, A.MEMBER_ID, A.ANIMAL_ID, A.VISIT_DATE, A.APPLY_DATE, A.STATUS, A.REJECT_REASON,
M.MEMBER_NAME, M.NICKNAME, M.EMAIL, M.PHONE, M.PROFILE_IMG,
AN.ANIMAL_NAME, AN.ANIMAL_TYPE, AN.BREED, AN.AGE, AN.GENDER, AN.ADOPTION_STATUS, AN.PERSONALITY,
AI.SAVE_FILE_NAME AS MAIN_IMAGE,
D.JOB, D.HOUSING_TYPE, D.PET_EXPERIENCE, D.ADDRESS, D.ADOPTION_REASON FROM ADOPTION A JOIN MEMBER M ON A.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID JOIN ANIMAL AN ON A.ANIMAL_ID = AN.ANIMAL_ID LEFT JOIN ADOPTION_DETAIL D ON A.ADOPTION_ID = D.ADOPTION_ID LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE AI ON AN.ANIMAL_ID = AI.ANIMAL_ID AND AI.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE A.ADOPTION_ID = #{_parameter}
